hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo $f | grep -qE '\.py$'; then uv run ruff check --fix $f && uv run ruff format $f; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo $f | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env$'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: do not edit .env files"}'; fi; }
